description: Audit, ops and observability contract. Design: docs/backend/audit-ops-observability-design.md.

audit_logs.purpose: Append-only management and sensitive business operation trail.

workspace_code.rule: Workspace-scoped operations must write the concrete workspace_code. Global identity/login operations use global unless a workspace is present in detail_json.

detail_json.privacy_rule: Must not contain token, cookie, password, OIDC code, .env content, or raw secret-like values.
detail_json.redaction_rule: write_audit must pass detail_json through the shared secret-like redactor. Keys containing token, secret, password, cookie, authorization, api_key, .env, client_secret, or session are stored as [REDACTED].

workspace_code.rule: When present, response is filtered to that workspace and caller must be super_admin or workspace admin.

permissions.without_workspace_code: Requires global super_admin and returns global query scope.
permissions.with_workspace_code: Requires global super_admin or workspace admin membership for that workspace.

audit_logs_page.request_rule: Call GET /api/audit-logs with the current workspace_code and limit=80.
audit_logs_page.empty_state: Must explain which actions create audit records.
audit_logs_page.error_state: Must show API errors instead of rendering an empty success state.
